analysis.reasoning: Core message: Trust WHO and scientific experts over 'habitual liars'; propose an international experts' investigation trip to the US. This frames unnamed actors as liars and implicitly challenges the US by calling for an investigation there. Evaluation per narrative: CH1 (The West is immoral, hostile and decadent) — The tweet implies deceit by (likely) Western/US actors and specifically targets the US for investigation, portraying it negatively; this aligns with CH1. CH2 (China is a benevolent power) — No mention of China’s cooperative international role or benevolence. CH3 (China has an epic history) — Not addressed. CH4 (China has an appropriate political system and honorable values) — Not addressed; no reference to China’s domestic system or values. CH5 (CCP government succeeds) — No claims about CCP governance or achievements. CH6 (China’s culture/nature) — Not relevant. Conclusion: The tweet promotes CH1 only.
